research_question: After the guard-only and extraction-only VSUMD60 family seeds both failed, can one final restrained family seed that changes only the weight mapping improve tradability and low-liquidity exposure without giving back the confirmed standalone VSUMD60 edge?

time_partition_plan.note: The frozen 2022-2025 test window remains excluded by construction through the trainval-only snapshot.

weight_mapping_contract.mapping_definition: Keep the VSUMD60 score, ranking eligibility, TopK membership, and base equal-weight extraction unchanged. For each selected TopK row on the same signal_date, compute weight_mapping_multiplier = 0.75 + 0.50 * liquidity_rank, multiply the base target_weight_D0 by that multiplier, then renormalize the mapped target weights across the same-signal-date TopK so they sum to 1.0.

constants_frozen.ranking_eligibility_guard: inherit standalone confirmatory VSUMD60 reference with no additional liquidity guard
constants_frozen.portfolio_extraction_rule: inherit standalone confirmatory VSUMD60 equal-weight TopK extraction
constants_frozen.portfolio_refresh_rule: inherit current full daily refresh from the standalone confirmatory reference unless explicitly superseded in a later seed round

decision_rule.interpretation: This final single-dimension seed is allowed only if the weight-mapping tilt preserves or improves standalone edge, does not materially worsen drawdown, and achieves at least non-worse low-liquidity and cost-stress behavior.

design_constraints: Only the weight mapping may change in this seed round.
Do not reopen the failed Alpha158-to-v18 direct overlay path.
Do not add any second atomic signal.
Do not change score field, ranking direction, TopK width, extraction rule, refresh rule, benchmark, or execution semantics in this round.
disallowed_changes: Do not change the VSUMD60 score field or ranking direction.
Do not add multi-signal blends or overlays.
Do not change the snapshot, contract, or validation window after registration.
Do not introduce a new ranking guard in this round.
Do not compare only to v18; the primary reference for this round must be the confirmatory standalone VSUMD60 winner.
notes: This prereg defines the final restrained family-seed transition from the confirmed standalone VSUMD60 winner.
The guard-only and extraction-only seeds both failed, so this round changes exactly one remaining core dimension: weight mapping.
